column1: 一言余計なことを言ったばかりに、彼女と仲が悪くなった。
column2: ひとことよけいなことをいったばかりに、かのじょとなかがわるくなった。
column3: Just because I said one unnecessary thing, our relationship with her worsened.
column4: ばかりに (simply because / just because — negative consequence)
column5: Verb[た] + ばかりに / Adj + ばかりに
column6: expressing regret that one single reason or action led to a negative consequence; 'just because of X, Y happened'
column8: ばかりに = single reason causes unfortunate result (regret); せいで = because of (blame, broader); ために = neutral cause; だけで = just by/with (less emotional)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:ばかりに source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:low complexity:advanced
